Project.Name: Pose Imitation of Human Motion by a Simulated Humanoid Robot
Project.Title: CPSM 2026S - Group C

Task.Name: Sony A7 III HDMI-to-USB capture integration
Prof. Meeting - Camera & detection working; robot falls
Geometric IK - shoulder pitch & elbow roll
Upper body safe mode (restrict lower joints)
Prof. Meeting - Arms & head follow human
Full body imitation test & balance validation
CSV logging - joint commands, keypoints, perf
Performance tuning - FPS, latency, model complexity
Demo video recording (swing arm, crouch, walk)
